column1: # String values shown as 'text', integers as digits.
type bar record [x:number y:boolean z:string] make bar [1 false "s"]
type bar record [x:number y:boolean z:string] make bar [y:false x:2 z:"Z"]
type foo record [x:integer y:string] type bar table foo bar
type foo record [x:integer y:string] type bar table foo make bar [[1 a] [2 b]]
type foo record [x:integer y:string] type bar table foo make bar [[x:1 y:a] [x:2 y:b]]
type foo record [x:any] type bar record [x:number] (table foo) unify (table bar)
type foo record [x:number] type bar record [y:number] (table foo) unify (table bar)
# Table does not unify with list
# Record with inline disjunct field (list evaluated as code)
# Record with inline disjunct - unification narrows
record [x:number y:[string or none]] unify record [x:number y:string]
# Make record with inline disjunct - none value
type foo record [x:number y:[string or none]] make foo [42 none]
# Make record with inline disjunct - string value
type foo record [x:number y:[string or none]] make foo [42 "hello"]
# Record with user-defined type field (disjunct for optional)
type OptStr (string or none) type foo record [x:number y:OptStr] foo
# Record with user-defined type - unification narrows disjunct
type OptStr (string or none) type foo record [x:number y:OptStr] foo unify record [x:number y:string]
# Make record with optional field - string value
type OptStr (string or none) type foo record [x:number y:OptStr] make foo [42 "hello"]
# Make record with optional field - none value
type OptStr (string or none) type foo record [x:number y:OptStr] make foo [42 none]
# Make record from map - all fields provided
type foo record [x:number y:string] make foo {x:1 y:"hi"}
# Make record from map - optional field provided
type foo record [x:number y:[string or none]] make foo {x:1 y:"hi"}
# Make record from map - optional field omitted (defaults to none)
type foo record [x:number y:[string or none]] make foo {x:1}
# Make record from named list - optional field omitted (defaults to none)
type foo record [x:number y:[string or none]] make foo [x:1]
# Make record from map - missing required field is an error
type foo record [x:number y:string] make foo {x:1}
# Make record from map - unknown field is an error
type foo record [x:number y:string] make foo {x:1 y:"hi" z:3}
# Table with optional field - mixed string and none values
type OptStr (string or none) type foo record [x:number y:OptStr] type bar table foo make bar [[1 "a"] [2 none]]
# Record with nested user-defined record type
type Inner record [z:string] type Outer record [a:number b:Inner] Outer
